codeReview.summary: Pass. The original feature commit `a98cf07` forwarded `MultiProvider` trace/request hooks for routed OpenAI models, but it still resolved top-level trace metadata from `RunConfig.model` only. The follow-up commit `a459d57` now computes the same effective requested model fallback used by request preparation (`RunConfig.model` first, then `Agent.model`) before calling `resolve_trace_metadata`, and it adds a regression proving the `Agent.model` + `MultiProvider` path now carries `agent_harness_id` through top-level trace metadata, exported generation spans, and outbound request metadata while preserving the existing `RunConfig.model` and override-precedence behavior.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed review, the original `a98cf07` diff, the fix handoff/transcript, and the follow-up `a459d57` diff. `crates/agents-core/src/run.rs:430-441` now resolves trace metadata with the same effective model fallback later used for request preparation, and `crates/agents-core/src/run.rs:3277-3388` adds coverage for the routed `Agent.model` path. I found no remaining blocking or non-blocking issues in this fix and no new shared-state gaps to record.
